task_objective: Footwear Line Art to Shoe Design & 9-View 3x3 - Map Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 shoe line art, original shoe structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.structural_reference: Figure 1 Shoe Line Art - Sole shape, heel height, toe box, vamp, lace system, silhouette, proportions - LOCKED
input_assets.aesthetic_reference: Figure 2 Inspiration Image - Colors, pattern, texture, material style - applied to shoe only

workflow.step_1: Parse Figure 1 shoe structure + extract Figure 2 aesthetic DNA
workflow.step_2: View_1 (FIXED): 1:1 replica of Figure 2 aesthetics. Views 2-9 (DESIGNER): same DNA reinterpreted through 8 distinct footwear designer/brand aesthetics
workflow.step_3: Verify Figure 1 shoe structure unchanged across all views, assemble 9-view 3x3 grid

outputs.view_1: Precise Replica - 1:1 replica of Figure 2 aesthetics on Figure 1 shoe, SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_2: Christian Louboutin - Red-lacquered soles, sculptural heels, sensual curves, glamorous embellishment
outputs.view_3: Tinker Hatfield - Architectural innovation, visible technology, bold color blocking, performance-driven design
outputs.view_4: Manolo Blahnik - Refined elegance, slender stiletto, exotic materials, artisan craftsmanship
outputs.view_5: Salvatore Ferragamo - Inventive construction, rainbow palette, sculpted wedge, heritage leatherwork
outputs.view_6: Sergio Rossi - Sensual geometry, precision cut, metallic finishes, red-carpet sophistication
outputs.view_7: Stella McCartney - Sustainable luxury, clean lines, chunky platform, eco-conscious material innovation
outputs.view_8: Rick Owens - Dark avant-garde, exaggerated platforms, brutalist forms, gothic minimalism
outputs.view_9: Tabitha Simmons - Romantic whimsy, floral prints, vintage-inspired, feminine detailing

output_requirements: SHOE LOCK: Figure 1 shoe structure identical across all 9 views — zero structural deviation
Model foot: Asian/Caucasian/African, auto-adapted and consistent across all views. Walking step captured mid-stride, showcasing dynamic shoe motion and energetic stride.
SFW; realistic material rendering; consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
No text/labels/watermarks; Premium 3x3, cinematic grading, luxury white space, footwear editorial standard
